stemHtml: Which of the following describes an autocratic cockpit?

options.a: The captain’s excessive authority considerably reduces communications and consequently the synergy and cohesion of the crew
options.b: Each of the members chooses what job to do without telling the others and in the belief that everyone is aware of what he is doing
options.c: Despite the overly strong authority of the captain, everything functions correctly owing to his natural leadership
options.d: The atmosphere is relaxed thanks to a captain who leaves complete freedom to the various members of the crew
